conversations.say: Samira, my client supplied a route segment that looks manufactured, and I omitted that problem from my interim report. I will not turn intervention into homicide without evidence.
conversations.offer: I will give you bounded access to my Vale timeline and label the manufactured segment and all remaining uncertainty.
conversations.request: Tell me what you personally know of Vale's route, who first supplied any conflicting route account, and whether you know who retained me. If your account conflicts with another witness, consent to a protected case conference.

conversations.say: Inez, I have Vale entering the neighborhood near the former printing floor two days before this gathering. That establishes only a location, not what followed.
conversations.offer: I will convene a voluntary case conference under protection terms: no police claims, no forced disclosure, and explicit separation of intervention, escape, and harm.
conversations.request: Give me your voluntary account of Vale's route through the neighborhood, identify any segment you personally witnessed, and propose the protection terms you require before meeting a conflicting witness.

conversations.say: Rafi, I am testing a physical route, not assigning an identity to R. My current location evidence places Vale near the former printing floor two days before tonight.
conversations.offer: I will show you O08 and share only the route portion needed to compare your account, provided you distinguish firsthand observation from rumor.
conversations.request: Give me your voluntary account of when and where you personally saw Vale, identify any missing route segment, and consent to a later conference if your account conflicts with Inez's.

public_statement: I am collecting voluntary accounts. I will not treat an R-associated account as proof of its sender, intervention as proof of homicide, or fragments and promises as proof that a complete article existed.

commitments.promise: Provide bounded timeline access, disclose the manufactured client lead, and label unresolved uncertainty in exchange for provenance and a voluntary account.
Convene a voluntary protected case conference if two witness accounts conflict and both witnesses consent.
Use the account only as a bounded route comparison and invite a protected conference before drawing a conclusion from any conflict.

correction: My interim report omitted that the anonymous client's route segment appears manufactured; any conclusion based on it must remain provisional.
goal_progress: Requested voluntary accounts from three distinct social knots: C13, C16, and C09.
Offered bounded timeline access to C13 in exchange for client and route provenance.
Proposed protection terms and witness consent for a future two-witness case conference.
Marked the manufactured client segment as the first unresolved contradiction pending independent route accounts.
reasoning_summary: Morgan prioritizes witness consent and provenance over a saleable conclusion, discloses the omitted manufactured lead to a potential provenance source, and seeks independently bounded route accounts before convening conflicting witnesses.
